handoff_gate.rule: Use handoff when work needs another role, role mismatch, blocker, failed verification, scope change, or security/release review.

reason: Implementation complete and ready for independent verification.
completed: Ran the primary execution command successfully.
needs_continuation: Verify acceptance criteria on the changed files.
Confirm there is no regression in related tests.
recommended_next_step: Run QA verification and either close the task or create a targeted follow-up task.
